creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 205125
svn .diff

Update 
 * version 1.9 -> 1.10
 * new maintainer
 * new upstream naming "NAME-" -> "NAME-VERSION" and an own icon, 
   then delete MASTER_SITES, DISTFILES and EXTRACT_ONLY
 * update LICENSE and add LICENSE_FILE
 * add NEWS to PORTDOCS

Built on: "FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r348736 GENERIC  amd64"

Testing:

 * portlint -C
 * port test
 * poudriere testport -j 130Camd64 -p default -i -o games/galaxis


Please commit it,

Thanks,
Alfonso
